== Notes for [[Item:Q111080|Q111080]] ==

Died : omk 340 BC - -

--------------------
Died : omk 340 BC
--------------------
Died : omk 340 BC
--------------------
Died : omk 340 BC

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per09765.htm#0

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
